name: FORRESTER RESEAR.  DL-,01
summary: Forrester Research is a market research company that provides advice on technology and its impact to global business leaders. The company offers research, data, consulting, and events to guide companies in making technology decisions and developing customer-obsessed strategies, operating out of Cambridge, Massachusetts. Forrester's services help clients understand market dynamics, customer behavior, and emerging technologies to drive growth and improve business performance.
